name: ChargePoint
description: ChargePoint operates one of the world's largest EV charging networks, providing a Web Services API for finding stations, checking real-time availability, managing load, initiating and monitoring charging sessions, and accessing usage data for fleet and home charging deployments.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Stations API
itemListElement.description: Retrieve detailed information about ChargePoint charging stations, including location, address, GPS coordinates, power specifications, port counts, pricing, and station model details.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Station Status API
itemListElement.description: Query real-time status of ChargePoint charging station ports. Returns port availability states including AVAILABLE, INUSE, UNREACHABLE, and UNKNOWN with timestamps.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Load Management API
itemListElement.description: Monitor and control power load at ChargePoint charging stations. Retrieve current load in kilowatts and issue load shedding commands.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Charging Sessions API
itemListElement.description: Access charging session data for ChargePoint stations, including energy consumed (kWh), session start and end timestamps, and driver information.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Alarms API
itemListElement.description: Retrieve and manage alarms from ChargePoint charging stations. Returns alarm type, alarm timestamp, and station identifier.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Station Groups API
itemListElement.description: Manage and query ChargePoint station groups that organize charging infrastructure by location, fleet, or organizational unit.

itemListElement.name: ChargePoint Fleet Management API
itemListElement.description: Manage electric vehicle fleet charging through ChargePoint's platform. Access vehicle registration, driver assignment, charging schedules, and fleet-level usage reporting.

subjectOf.name: ChargePoint Web Services API v5.1
subjectOf.description: SOAP/WSDL Web Services API using WS-Security authentication for EV charging station management.
